prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk neon portrait of a mysterious young woman standing centered in a dark futuristic city scene, head slightly bowed, hands tucked into the front pocket of an oversized dark purple hoodie. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque muted-purple square censor block, while dark messy hair and wispy curls are visible around it. The hoodie has a bright glowing handwritten logo reading Future across the chest in electric magenta-purple. Behind her, fill most of the background with massive rough brushstroke typography reading FUTURE, painted in vivid neon violet with splattered edges and intense glow. Use a smoky black and purple night atmosphere with drifting mist, sparks, light particles, distant blurred city lights, and a high-contrast ultraviolet rim light around the figure. Add exactly 6 translucent sci-fi HUD interface panels around the edges: 1 top-left panel labeled “SYSTEM_OVERVIEW” with a 100% processing bar, 1 top-right panel labeled “CYBER_ID_07” and “LOADING FUTURE,” 1 mid-right vertical stacked tech module panel, 1 bottom-left panel labeled “NEON CITY” with small Japanese text and an energy level bar, 1 lower-left tiny coordinates/access-granted panel, and 1 bottom-right panel labeled “FUTURE IS NOW” with status lines and a small globe diagram. Visual style: cinematic cyberpunk poster, photorealistic figure with stylized neon graphics, deep blacks, saturated purple and magenta lighting, glowing haze, sharp hoodie details, dramatic backlight, no extra characters, no watermark.
